title: Build the same-device Clone operation journal and state machine
objective: Implement the minimal versioned localStorage journal and deterministic operation state machine for same-device, same-browser Clone recovery.
acceptanceCriteria: Run a localStorage write, read, and remove availability preflight before Clone confirmation.
Persist only schemaVersion, operationId, roomId, templateVersion, title, startDate, payloadFingerprint, state, createdAt, and updatedAt.
Apply a seven-day expiry and validate the journal schema and template version before recovery.
Validate operation, room, template-derived IDs, state, and payload fingerprint on every recovery.
Treat every Journal record as untrusted input and never persist the transformed trip payload.
Describe and implement recovery as same-device and same-browser only, without cross-device guarantees.
Share one in-flight operation for duplicate confirmation and reuse the same operation identity across retry and reload.
Never automatically write from an expired, invalid, stale, or incompatible Journal.
Use the fingerprint only for consistency checking, never as authorization or a security signature.
